summary: A 3D parkour gaming website built with React Three Fiber featuring running, jumping, obstacle courses, platforms, a timer, and score tracking.
architectural_notes: Built with React Three Fiber for 3D rendering in the browser
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Neon parkour logo with bold angular letters and glowing orange outline on a transparent background (parkour-logo.dim_512x128.png)
- Dark urban skybox panorama with faint neon city lights and graffiti silhouettes (skybox-bg.dim_2048x1024.png)

existing_features.title: Build a 3D parkour game environment using React Three Fiber with a series of platforms, ramps, gaps, and obstacles arranged as a challenging obstacle course the player must navigate from start to finish.

Implement smooth player movement controls: WASD or arrow keys to move/run, spacebar to jump (with single and double-jump support), and mouse look to control the camera direction in first- or third-person view.
Add a run timer that starts when the player leaves the start zone and stops when the player reaches the finish zone, displaying elapsed time in MM:SS.ms format on a persistent HUD overlay.
Implement a local leaderboard that records the player's top 10 fastest completion times per level, displayed on a scoreboard screen accessible from the main menu and after completing a run.
Create a main menu screen with options to Start Game, view the Leaderboard, and see Controls. Include a brief animated 3D preview of the parkour course as the background.

Apply a high-energy urban/neon-graffiti visual theme throughout the app: dark backgrounds with vivid neon accent colors (electric orange, lime green, hot pink), bold angular typography, glowing platform edges, and particle effects on jumps and landings.

new_feature_requests.summary: 3D parkour game environment with platforms and obstacles
Player movement controls: running and jumping
